title: Crypto PAC pours $1M into Michigan Democratic primary race
summary: Donavan McKinney, running against Michigan incumbent Shri Thanedar, said that “the crypto lobby is paying my opponent back for helping Trump“ with the PAC-funded ads.

title: Southwest Beats Estimates on Strong Demand, Premium Spending
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. provided an outlook for the full year that exceeded Wall Street’s projections, citing robust travel demand and spending on the carrier’s premium products, even as operating revenue and passenger revenue for the second quarter missed analysts’ estimates.

title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
summary: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

title: Alibaba's New Qwen Image 3 AI Wants to Be Useful, Not Just Pretty
summary: Qwen Image 3.0 generates dense newspapers and infographic grids in one shot and renders text down to 10 pixels. The catch: no benchmarks, no open weights.
